title: 3D textures: Renewed (Pixel By Pixel)
description: This is a YouTube series where I make every texture in Minecraft 3D.
body:
Welcome to my 3D textures. This is part of a series i have been doing on YouTube where i turn every texture 3D. This has been a blast to make so i hope you enjoy it as much as i did making it.

## **This pack includes:**

### **Tools**

![mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11d20e8a215fe2c89031b7a21b65b2c65bb9ffdd.png)

### **Food**

![food](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e76a3916b3db519f219349ed7511018bd0189012.png)

### **And many more items**

![axolotyl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebb9b39a84f41cdb52d5b78cf7f469e747016345.png)
